bounty.title: Publish Sourcey docs for a maintained OSS library

summary: Validated a live Sourcey-generated Go API documentation site for nilstate/scafld on the project-owned 0state.com domain. The target is a maintained MIT-licensed third-party OSS library pinned to commit ce26b0c0637a0f0acd1c6be4397bda14668844ec. The live docs expose 74 package/API pages under /scafld/docs/go-api and were validated with runx-cli 0.6.13.

target.commit_message: ci: limit receipt verification push scope

sourcey.adapter: Sourcey godoc adapter configured in docs/sourcey.config.ts
sourcey.config_summary: docs/sourcey.config.ts sets name=scafld, repo=https://github.com/nilstate/scafld, markdown documentation tab, and a Go API tab using godoc({ module: '..', packages: ['./cmd/scafld', './internal/core/...', './internal/app/...', './internal/adapters/...', './internal/platform/...'], mode: 'live', includeTests: true, includeUnexported: false, hideUndocumented: false }).

observations.evidence: runx --version equivalent command was npx -y @runxhq/cli@0.6.13 --version and output was exactly: runx-cli 0.6.13.
https://0state.com/scafld returned HTTP 200 with title scafld. 0state, linked to https://github.com/nilstate/scafld, and linked into the docs area.
https://0state.com/scafld/docs/go-api returned HTTP 200, title Go API - scafld, and meta generator Sourcey 3.6.0.
GitHub API for nilstate/scafld returned MIT license, pushed_at 2026-06-30T05:49:43Z, and description Deterministic protocol for multi-phase agent work.
GitHub API verified pinned commit ce26b0c0637a0f0acd1c6be4397bda14668844ec with commit date 2026-06-30T05:49:41Z.
Local shallow checkout at the pinned commit contained 251 Go source files.
docs/sourcey.config.ts at the pinned commit uses Sourcey godoc over cmd/scafld, internal/core, internal/app, internal/adapters, and internal/platform package globs.
docs/package.json at the pinned commit defines site:build as sourcey build -o ../dist and depends on sourcey ^3.6.0.
The live Go API index exposed 74 unique /scafld/docs/go-api/pkg-* package pages, exceeding the 20-concept minimum.
https://0state.com/scafld/docs/go-api/pkg-internal-core-receipt returned HTTP 200, title internal/core/receipt - scafld, generator Sourcey 3.6.0, and 110013 bytes.
https://0state.com/scafld/docs/go-api/pkg-internal-app-validate returned HTTP 200, title internal/app/validate - scafld, generator Sourcey 3.6.0, and 54967 bytes.
https://0state.com/scafld/docs/go-api/pkg-internal-adapters-cli-config returned HTTP 200, title internal/adapters/cli/config - scafld, generator Sourcey 3.6.0, and 51449 bytes.
runx verify for sha256:c6cf4e6c449453a94f55c08303088ae4e7551046910faa232e5e14a45b5484b9 returned valid=true with signature_mode=production when using receipt-public-key-base64.txt.

risk_notes: This packet intentionally uses a live project-owned Sourcey documentation URL on 0state.com instead of re-hosting under a personal, preview, raw, or throwaway domain.
The work is framed as governed validation and evidence packaging for an already project-owned Sourcey publication. Final QA must decide whether this satisfies the bounty's publish wording.
